brand.name: S. Taylor Bookkeeping
brand.footerTagline: Cleanup and catch-up bookkeeping for nonprofits and small businesses. Clean records, delivered with care — and without judgment.

hero.subheadline: Months or years behind? Don't worry. I methodically overhaul disorganized financials and deliver pristine records — so tax season stops being the thing you dread.

card.caption: Real client. Real turnaround. Fully accountant-ready.

about.title: I specialize in the cleanup — not the routine.
about.imageAlt: A calm workspace — open laptop, green notebook, cup of coffee.
paragraphs: Most bookkeepers handle ongoing maintenance. My practice is different: I come in when things have already gotten away from you, and I restore order.

Many of my clients arrive feeling overwhelmed — behind by months or years, unsure where to start, and nervous about the cost. I assess the situation, lay out a clear plan, and methodically bring everything current.
about.pullQuote: My goal is simple: clean records, reduced stress, and readiness for tax filing.

owner.photoAlt: Sophia Taylor, founder of S. Taylor Bookkeeping
owner.name: Sophia Taylor
owner.title: Founder & Bookkeeper
owner.quote: I built this practice because I saw too many business owners and nonprofits treated like they should've known better. You didn't. It's fixable — and that's what I'm here for.

services.title: Everything needed to get your books accountant-ready.
services.lede: From disorganized receipts to polished financial reports — here's exactly how I step in.

featured.label: service 01
featured.title: Bookkeeping Cleanup & Catch-Up
featured.description: Months behind. Years behind. It happens — and it's fixable. I come in, assess the damage, and bring everything current without skipping steps.

items.label: service 02
items.title: Accountant-Ready Prep
items.description: I prepare your financials so your accountant can file confidently, advise without hesitation, and avoid costly corrections later.

items.label: service 03
items.title: Financial Reporting
items.description: Reports that actually help you understand your business — P&L, balance sheets, cash flow. Not just numbers to satisfy the IRS.

items.label: service 04
items.title: Bank & Credit Reconciliation
items.description: I match your software to every account — bank, credit card, PayPal, Stripe — eliminating surprises and hidden inconsistencies.

items.label: service 05
items.title: Accounts Payable & Receivable
items.description: I organize and record bills, payments, invoices, and customer receipts so you have a clear picture of cash flow and obligations.

items.title: Efficiency without shortcuts
items.description: I complete work in a timely manner — never at the expense of accuracy.

items.title: A clear process
items.description: You always know what to expect, what's needed, and where we are.

items.title: Accountant-ready results
items.description: Your records arrive clean, organized, and immediately usable — no cleanup required.

items.title: Cost-conscious approach
items.description: Realistic solutions without unnecessary expense or inflated hours.

caseStudy.imageAlt: Minimalist desk with notebook and pen — methodical work.
paragraphs: A nonprofit organization came to me with financial records that were over seven years behind. They assumed the cleanup would take months — maybe a full year — and cost thousands.

I assessed their records, implemented a structured cleanup process, brought all financials fully up to date, and delivered accountant-ready books within one month — at a cost well below what they'd feared.
caseStudy.quote: Clarity, compliance, and peace of mind — far sooner and cheaper than anticipated.

testimonial.quote: I came in terrified about how behind we were. She took one look at our books, gave me a real plan, and delivered clean records faster and cheaper than I imagined possible.

stats.title: The proof is in the books.

audience.title: Made for those who need a reset.
items: Nonprofits with years of unorganized records
Organizations preparing for tax filing or audits
Anyone who needs cleanup before their accountant

contact.title: Ready for a fresh start?
contact.description: Fill out the form and I'll respond within 24 hours with next steps and a realistic estimate.
contact.scriptNote: No obligation, no judgment about how behind you are.
